creator: spam@rm-rf.kiev.ua
text:
Here is a list of typos and small mistakes in ports tree:

zero size files:
converters/ruby-iconv/distinfo
multimedia/vdr/files/patch-tools.c-indexregenfix
multimedia/zoneminder/files/zm_fbsd_camera.h
net-mgmt/noc/files/patch-main_management_commands_sync-doc.py
print/c2ps-letter/files/patch-aa

nonstandard files:
converters/lua-iconv/patch-Makefile

nonstandard lines in distinfo:
net/fping+ipv6/distinfo   # remove RMD160, SHA1

misspelled(wrong) USE_* vars in Makefile:
print/lyx/Makefile:USE_BZIP=    yes             # BZIP2
ftp/proftpd/Makefile:USE_CLAMAV=    yes     # don't exists
ftp/proftpd-devel/Makefile:USE_CLAMAV=  yes
dovecot2-antispam-plugin/Makefile:USE_CONFIGURE=    yes # GNU_CONFIGURE
multimedia/aegisub/Makefile:USE_FREETYPE2=  yes # don't exists
devel/d-feet/Makefile:USE_GTK=  yes         # removed
x11-themes/kde4-windeco-nitrogen/Makefile:USE_GZIP= yes # default, can be removed
benchmarks/phoronix-test-suite/Makefile:USE_GZIP=   yes
devel/lxr/Makefile:USE_GZIP=    yes
devel/vxlog/Makefile:USE_GZIP=  yes
games/ifm/Makefile:USE_GZIP=    yes
graphics/flam3/Makefile:USE_GZIP=   yes
graphics/xfractint/Makefile:USE_GZIP=   yes
ftp/lftp/Makefile:USE_GZIP= yes
net/pcbsd-netmanager/Makefile:USE_GZIP= yes
sysutils/warden/Makefile:USE_GZIP=  yes
sysutils/pbreg/Makefile:USE_GZIP=   yes
sysutils/libpcbsd/Makefile:USE_GZIP=    yes
textproc/simplexml/Makefile:USE_GZIP=   yes
filelight-kde4/Makefile:USE_LDCONFG=    yes     # USE_LDCONFIG
net-mgmt/collectd/Makefile:USE_NGINX=   yes     # don't exists
databases/ocaml-sqlite3/Makefile:USE_OCAML_PLIST=   yes # USE_OCAMLFIND_PLIST
www/ocaml-net/Makefile:USE_OCAML_PLIST= yes
lang/ocamlduce/Makefile:USE_OCAML_PLIST=    yes
net-mgmt/collectd/Makefile:USE_PDNS=    yes     # don't exists
comms/p5-SMS-SMS77/Makefile:USE_PERL=   yes     # USE_PERL5
databases/mysqltuner/Makefile:USE_PERL= yes
devel/bsdbuild/Makefile:USE_PERL=   yes
devel/p5-File-Assets/Makefile:USE_PERL= yes
devel/p5-Path-Abstract/Makefile:USE_PERL=   yes
devel/p5-Gearman-Client-Async/Makefile:USE_PERL=    yes
devel/p5-Path-Resource/Makefile:USE_PERL=   yes
devel/p5-Tie-LLHash/Makefile:USE_PERL=  yes
devel/p5-Carp-REPL/Makefile:USE_PERL=   yes
emulators/snes9x-gtk/Makefile:USE_PERL= 5.8.1+
graphics/gdal/Makefile:USE_PERL=        yes
www/p5-CatalystX-LeakChecker/Makefile:USE_PERL= yes
www/p5-CatalystX-Profile/Makefile:USE_PERL= yes
www/p5-CatalystX-REPL/Makefile:USE_PERL=    yes
www/p5-CatalystX-SimpleLogin/Makefile:USE_PERL= yes
www/p5-CatalystX-InjectComponent/Makefile:USE_PERL= yes
www/p5-Catalyst-ActionRole-ACL/Makefile:USE_PERL=   yes
mail/rspamd/Makefile: USE_PERL= 5.8+
multimedia/mythtv/Makefile:USE_PERL=    yes
print/lyx/Makefile:USE_PERL=    yes
print/lyx-devel/Makefile:USE_PERL=  yes
sysutils/monitorix/Makefile:USE_PERL=   5.8+
sysutils/rsyncbackup/Makefile:USE_PERL= yes
net-mgmt/nagios-snmp-plugins-extras/Makefile:USE_PERL_RUN=  yes # USE_PERL5_RUN
audio/libbs2b/Makefile:USE_PKGCONFIG=   yes     # don't exists
graphics/libraw/Makefile:USE_PKGCONFIG=  yes
net/pcbsd-netmanager/Makefile:USE_QMAKE=    yes
sysutils/warden/Makefile:USE_QMAKE= yes
sysutils/pbreg/Makefile:USE_QMAKE=  yes
textproc/goldendict/Makefile:USE_QT4=   linguist
audio/puddletag/Makefile:USE_QT_VERSION=        4       # USE_QT_VER
textproc/ruby-htree/Makefile:USE_RUBY_RD2=      yes
databases/xapian-bindings/Makefile:USE_RUBY_RDOCS=  no      # USE_RUBY_RDOC
net/opal3/Makefile:USE_SLD= yes         # don't exists
mail/squirrelmail-user_special_mailboxes-plugin/Makefile:USE_SQ_COMPAT= yes # USE_SM_COMPAT
converters/drg2sbg/Makefile:USE_SSL=    yes     # don't exists
